# 成人＆同意あり、Explicit要求（管理側ON時のみ有効化）
curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/rituals/plan   -H "Content-Type: application/json"   -d '{
    "pair_context": {
      "adult_confirmed": true,
      "mutual_consent": true,
      "boundaries": ["口使用可","手使用可","痛みNG"],
      "health_flags": [],
      "goals": ["チャクラ活性","信頼深化"],
      "birth_yyyymmdd": "19800622"
    },
    "scores": {
      "overall": 82,
      "kundalini": 84,
      "scores": {"grounding":85,"prana":83,"polarity":80,"comms":78,"consent":88,"sacred":82}
    },
    "mode": "explicit"
  }'

# 未成年、または同意なし → Liteに自動ダウングレード
curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/rituals/plan   -H "Content-Type: application/json"   -d '{
    "pair_context": {
      "adult_confirmed": false,
      "mutual_consent": false,
      "boundaries": [],
      "health_flags": [],
      "goals": [],
      "birth_yyyymmdd": "20100401"
    },
    "scores": {"overall": 70, "kundalini": 70, "scores": {}},
    "mode": "explicit"
  }'
